query:
SELECT u.name AS rep, p.id, p.name AS project, p.location, p.priority, p.actionTier,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready_contacts,
  rn
FROM (
  SELECT pp.id, pp.name, pp.location, pp.priority, pp.actionTier, pp.discoveryStatus,
    pu.userId,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pu.userId ORDER BY
      CASE pp.actionTier WHEN 'tier1_actionable' THEN 1 WHEN 'tier2_watch' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
      CASE pp.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
    ) AS rn
  FROM projects pp
  JOIN projectUsers pu ON pu.projectId = pp.id
  WHERE pp.priority = 'hot' AND pp.suppressed = 0 AND pp.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
) ranked
JOIN users u ON u.id = ranked.userId
JOIN projects p ON p.id = ranked.id
WHERE rn <= 5
ORDER BY u.name, rn;

    ) AS rn

  WHERE pp.priority = 'hot' AND pp.suppressed = 0 AND pp.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
